pattern: Binary search the answer: for a candidate maximum, splitting a bag of size v into pieces of at most m costs ceil(v/m)-1 operations.
hints: The penalty (the largest bag) is monotone: if a maximum of m is achievable within the operation budget, so is any larger maximum.
Binary search over the candidate penalty m from 1 to the largest bag.
A bag of size v needs ceil(v/m)-1 splits to make every piece at most m; sum these and check the total against maxOperations.

edge_inputs.description: operations exceed need, penalty floors at one

stress.description: many bags of moderate size with a modest operation budget
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    nums = [rng.randrange(1, 1001) for _ in range(n)]
    ops = rng.randrange(1, 5000)
    return [nums, ops]
